British lawn bowler

| Sport | |
| Club | Cooper Avon |
| Medal record  |  |  | | --- | --- | |  | | | Representing  [England](/wiki/England "England") | | | |  | | | | [World Outdoor Championships](/wiki/World_Bowls_Events "World Bowls Events") | | | | Bronze medal – third place | [2008 Christchurch](/wiki/2008_World_Outdoor_Bowls_Championship "2008 World Outdoor Bowls Championship") | [Men's fours](/wiki/2008_World_Outdoor_Bowls_Championship "2008 World Outdoor Bowls Championship") | | Bronze medal – third place | [2012 Adelaide](/wiki/2012_World_Outdoor_Bowls_Championship "2012 World Outdoor Bowls Championship") | [Men's Pairs](/wiki/2012_World_Outdoor_Bowls_Championship "2012 World Outdoor Bowls Championship") | | [Commonwealth Games](/wiki/Commonwealth_Games "Commonwealth Games") | | | | Bronze medal – third place | [2010 Delhi](/wiki/2010_Commonwealth_Games "2010 Commonwealth Games") | [Men's Triples](/wiki/Lawn_bowls_at_the_2010_Commonwealth_Games_%E2%80%93_Men%27s_triples "Lawn bowls at the 2010 Commonwealth Games – Men's triples") | | [Atlantic Bowls Championships](/wiki/Atlantic_Bowls_Championships "Atlantic Bowls Championships") | | | | Silver medal – second place | 2009 Johannesburg | triples | | Silver medal – second place | 2009 Johannesburg | fours | | Gold medal – first place | 2011 Paphos | triples | | Bronze medal – third place | 2015 Paphos | pairs | | |

**Graham Anthony George Shadwell** (born 1975)[[1]](#cite_note-1) is an [English](/wiki/England "England") international [bowls](/wiki/Bowls "Bowls") player.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## Bowls career

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Graham_Shadwell&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Bowls career")]

Shadwell won the 1999 [national junior singles](/wiki/Bowls_England_National_Championships_(men%27s_junior_singles) "Bowls England National Championships (men's junior singles)") defeating [Robert Newman](/wiki/Robert_Newman_(bowls) "Robert Newman (bowls)") in the final.[[3]](#cite_note-3)

Shadwell won two bronze medals at consecutive [World Outdoor Championships](/wiki/World_Bowls_Events "World Bowls Events") in [2008](/wiki/2008_World_Outdoor_Bowls_Championship "2008 World Outdoor Bowls Championship") in the fours with [Mark Bantock](/wiki/Mark_Bantock "Mark Bantock"), [Stephen Farish](/wiki/Stephen_Farish "Stephen Farish") and Robert Newman and in [2012](/wiki/2012_World_Outdoor_Bowls_Championship "2012 World Outdoor Bowls Championship") in the pairs with [Jamie Chestney](/wiki/Jamie_Chestney "Jamie Chestney").[[4]](#cite_note-4)

In between the two World Championships he won another bronze medal in the [triples](/wiki/Lawn_bowls_at_the_2010_Commonwealth_Games_%E2%80%93_Men%27s_triples "Lawn bowls at the 2010 Commonwealth Games – Men's triples") with Bantock and Newman at the [lawn bowls competition at the 2010 Commonwealth Games](/wiki/Lawn_bowls_at_the_2010_Commonwealth_Games "Lawn bowls at the 2010 Commonwealth Games").[[5]](#cite_note-5)

In 2009 he won the triples and fours silver medals at the [Atlantic Bowls Championships](/wiki/Atlantic_Bowls_Championships "Atlantic Bowls Championships")[[6]](#cite_note-6)[[7]](#cite_note-7) and in 2011 he won the triples gold medal at the Atlantic Bowls Championships.[[8]](#cite_note-8) In 2015 he won the pairs bronze medal at the Atlantic Championships.[[9]](#cite_note-9)

In 2004 & 2008, he won the [Hong Kong International Bowls Classic](/wiki/Hong_Kong_International_Bowls_Classic "Hong Kong International Bowls Classic") pairs titles with [Mark Walton](/wiki/Mark_Walton_(bowls) "Mark Walton (bowls)").[[10]](#cite_note-10) He was selected to represent England at the [2016 World Outdoor Bowls Championship](/wiki/2016_World_Outdoor_Bowls_Championship "2016 World Outdoor Bowls Championship") but had to pull out and has won the English Indoor Bowling Association's Champion of Champions title twice.[[11]](#cite_note-11)
